title: Project Timelines
excerpt: It would be really handy for our on site construction managers that use the calendar view to see a date range instead of just a starting day for a project.  It would be nice to be able to give a start and end date and sh…

posts.author: KarlaLawson (Karla Lawson)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really handy for our on site construction managers that use the calendar view to see a date range instead of just a starting day for a project. It would be nice to be able to give a start and end date and show that project running through all of the dates.
